channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] INGUSHETIA → nan : Fight with small arms and light weapons (nan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: INGUSHETIA / nan. Location: nan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] GUNMAN → KYIV : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: GUNMAN / KYIV. Location: Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] GUNMAN → CRIMINAL : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: GUNMAN / CRIMINAL. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] FRANCE → FRANCE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Ghanduriyah, Nabatî, Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: FRANCE / FRANCE. Location: Ghanduriyah, Nabatî, Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] IRANIAN → nan : Assassinate (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Assassinate. Actors: IRANIAN / nan. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → PALESTINIAN : Engage in ethnic cleansing (Iraq)
item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in ethnic cleansing. Actors: ISRAEL / PALESTINIAN. Location: Iraq. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] HUMAN RIGHTS ACTIVIST → THE US : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: HUMAN RIGHTS ACTIVIST / THE US. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: RUSSIA / COMCAST. Location: Petersburg, Sankt-Peterburg, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: ISRAEL / GAZA. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.
